fields.polling_interval_hint: How often Recrest asks your git hosts for new pull requests. Lower values update faster but use more bandwidth and can hit provider rate limits.

sources.description: Folders Recrest scans recursively for git repositories.
sources.empty_desc: Add at least one folder so Recrest can discover your repositories.
sources.confirm_remove_desc: Repositories under {{path}} will disappear from the dashboard. The folder itself stays on disk.

providers.description: Connect a Personal Access Token to list pull requests.
providers.token_hint: A Personal Access Token is a long string issued by your git host instead of your password. Recrest needs one with read access to pull requests — e.g. the `repo` scope on GitHub, `read_api` on GitLab, or an app password with Pull Requests: Read on Bitbucket. Stored encrypted in your OS keychain, never in plain text.
providers.confirm_disconnect_desc: The token will be removed from the system keychain. You can reconnect any time.

desktop.web_disabled: These settings only apply when running the desktop app.
desktop.auto_start_desc: Launch Recrest when you log in.
desktop.start_minimized_desc: Open silently to the system tray instead of a foreground window.
desktop.close_to_tray_desc: Keep Recrest running in the tray when you close the window.
desktop.close_to_tray_hint: The system tray is the small icon area next to your clock. With this enabled, pressing the window close button hides Recrest there instead of quitting — click the tray icon to bring it back. Use Quit from the tray menu to actually exit.

notifications.enabled_desc: Allow Recrest to send native notifications.

updates.mode_hint: Automatic: download and install updates in the background, relaunch the app when ready. Notify me: tell me when one is available and let me decide. Off: never check.

diagnostics.crash_reporting_desc: Send anonymised crash reports to help us fix bugs.
diagnostics.crash_reporting_hint: Only triggered when Recrest crashes. Reports include the error, stack trace, OS/architecture and app version. No repo contents, paths, tokens or git data are sent.
diagnostics.git_hint: Recrest ships its own libgit2, so reading repo status works regardless. A system-wide git is only needed for future fetch/pull actions.
